nodes.label: core.session.end_session
nodes.rationale: Lazy-imported Cashew API for persisting conversation turns into the thought graph.

nodes.label: Threading Rule
nodes.rationale: sync_turn enqueues and returns immediately; non-daemon worker drains queue; shutdown posts sentinel and joins with timeout; worker logs WARNING on Cashew failure and continues.

nodes.label: No ~/.hermes writes
nodes.rationale: All paths scope under hermes_home; tests use tmp_path fixture.

nodes.label: Profile Isolation
nodes.rationale: Absolute paths in cashew_db_path are rejected to preserve profile isolation.

nodes.label: sync_turn <10 ms
nodes.rationale: Hot-path enqueue must return in under 10 ms.

nodes.label: HF_HUB_OFFLINE constraint
nodes.rationale: HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 etc. are process-wide; tests must never trigger the ~500 MB embedding model download.

nodes.label: Dual layout
nodes.rationale: Two load paths: pip namespace package and Hermes flat-entry loader.

nodes.label: Plugin Interface (Hermes ABC)
nodes.rationale: CashewMemoryProvider implements MemoryProvider ABC with specific contracts for lifecycle, threading, and retrieval.

nodes.label: Profile Isolation
nodes.rationale: All file paths scoped under hermes_home; never hardcode ~/.hermes.

nodes.label: Dual-path loading strategy
nodes.rationale: Supports both pip install -e . and hermes plugins install via dual layout with root __init__.py shim.

nodes.label: sqlite-vec semantic search
nodes.rationale: Optional SQLite extension that enables vector similarity search; falls back to keyword-based retrieval when unavailable.

nodes.label: _seed_node helper
nodes.rationale: Copy-pasted across test files to seed thought_nodes with v0.2.0 schema defaults.

nodes.label: _strip_comments_and_docstrings helper
nodes.rationale: AST-guided stripping preserves string literals used as arguments while removing standalone docstrings, to avoid false positives on forbidden pattern detection.

nodes.label: make_initialized_provider helper
nodes.rationale: Copy-paste idiom per PHASE_DESIGN_NOTES Decision Point 5.

nodes.label: test_sync_turn_empty_queue_strict_15ms
nodes.rationale: Enforces the ROADMAP's 10ms success criterion with 5ms headroom. Gated on CI_STRICT_TIMING env var so CI default pipeline doesn't flake.

nodes.label: make_initialized_provider helper
nodes.rationale: Copy-paste idiom per PHASE_DESIGN_NOTES Decision Point 5.
